MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2018 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-08-2018 AT 10:40 AM IN DEPT. 220, VISITING JUDGE CECILIA CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF ORALLY EXERCISED A CCP 170.6 PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE AS TO VISITING JUDGE LYNN O'MALLEY-TAYLOR. THE COURT ACCEPTED THE CHALLENGE AS TIMELY. TRIAL TIME ESTIMATE: 1-2 HOURS. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/TLJ)

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-08-2018 IN DEPT. 220 - THE COURT ORDERS 1438 VAN DYKE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA TO BE SOLD. THE COURT WILL APPOINT A REFEREE TO FACILITATE THE SALE OF SAID PROPERTY. THE COURT RULES INCOME RAISED FROM 1438 VAN DYKE TO BE PLACED ON A SPREAD SHEET AND PROVIDED TO REFEREE TO DETERMINE WHAT IS OWED TO MS. RABB. THE COURT DIRECTS MS. WIEDERHOLD TO PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER AND PROVIDE THE COURT AND MR. SANTOS COLORADO A COPY OF SAID ORDER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED; JUDGE: CECILIA CASTELLANOS; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY (D220).

calendar.matters:
Referee Report Of Sale And Request For Confirmation
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:

Plaintiff Maple Rabb is present in court.
Attorney Mary Catherine Wiederhold for Plaintiff.
Attorney Courtney M. Brown for Plaintiff.
Attorney Isaac Jacobson for Defendant George Santos Colorado.
Attorney Nancy Weng for Buyer Jianfeng Chen.
Attorney Carolyn Gold as Referee.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of Referee Report Of Sale And Request For Confirmation; the tentative ruling is adopted in part. The motion is granted. Prevailing party is to submit proposed orders and the Referee is to submit their report by the end of the day today. Judge Ronald E, Quidachay, Clerk Leslie Gomez, Not Reported. (501)

Motion To Set Aside Partition Sale
Off Calendar Aug-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Plaintiff Maple Rabb is present in court.
Attorney Mary Catherine Wiederhold for Plaintiff.
Attorney Courtney M. Brown for Plaintiff.
Attorney Isaac Jacobson for Defendant George Santos Colorado.
Attorney Nancy Weng for Buyer Jianfeng Chen.
Attorney Carolyn Gold as Referee.

After hearing arguments in the matter of DEFENDANT GEORGE SANTOS COLORADO Motion To Set Aside Partition Sale; the tentative ruling is adopted as DENIED. Attorney for Plaintiff Mary Catherine Wiederhold is to prepare the proposed order with all of the conditions instructed by the Court by the end of the day. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk Leslie Gomez, Not Reported. (501)
